1885320.name: AIR WARS - Simulator Device and VR compatible DLC
1885320.description:
DLC to help you use 3rd party simulator gear for a better experience.
You can use devices such as VR, HOTAS, and Track ir through this DLC, and we will continue to add supported devices.

We will strive to provide full compatibility with popular sets of simulation equipment.

Please let the community know what you think about supported devices.

Enjoy a more wonderful experience with simulator equipment.

*Supported devices*
- Most VR devices
- Thrustmaster HOTAS WARTHOG™
- Thrustmaster TFRP RUDDER Pedal is supported.
- Track IR-based head tracking device
1885320.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
